nixpacksConfig.setup: apt-get update && apt-get install -y libglib2.0-0 libnss3 libnss3-dev libatk-bridge2.0-0 libatk1.0-0 libatspi2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libgbm1 libasound2 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libxtst6 libpango-1.0-0 libcairo2 libx11-xcb1 libxcb1
nixpacksConfig.install: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
